originalTitle: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
content: It’s not who you live for… It’s who you’d die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer’s #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet. Connect with #HeartOfTheBeast Website: heartofthebeastmovie.com Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/heartofthebeast/?hl=en Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/heartofthebeast TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@heartofthebeastmovie Threads: https://www.threads.com/@heartofthebeast X: https://x.com/heartofthebeast Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group. Connect with Paramount Pictures Online: Official Site: http://www.paramount.com/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@paramountpics Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/ParamountPics Twitter: https://twitter.com/paramountpics YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/Paramount Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Paramount
chineseSummary: 派拉蒙影业 · 10,743,895 次观看
chineseContent: 这不是你为谁而活……而是你为谁而死。观看布拉德·皮特 (Brad Pitt) 出演大卫·艾尔 (David Ayer) 执导的 #HeartOfTheBeast 的新预告片 - 仅限 9 月 25 日在影院上映。在一场悲痛的飞机失事后，特种部队军官詹姆斯·贝尔蒙特（布拉德·皮特饰）和他的战犬奥丁发现自己被困在阿拉斯加荒野深处。他们一起被迫与自然环境进行残酷的生存斗争。 《野兽之心》由著名电影制作人大卫·艾尔执导，是一部激烈的冒险惊悚片，探讨了一个男人和他最好的朋友在面对迄今为止最伟大的战斗时之间牢不可破的联系。与 #HeartOfTheBeast 联系 网站：heartofthebeastmovie.com Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/heartofthebeast/?hl=en Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/heartofthebeast TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@heartofthebeastmovie 话题：https://www.threads.com/@heartofthebeast X：https://x.com/heartofthebeast派拉蒙影业公司 (PPC) 是一家全球电影娱乐制作商和发行商，是派拉蒙旗下 Skydance Corporation（纳斯达克代码：PSKY）的子公司，派拉蒙是一家领先的下一代全球媒体和娱乐公司，由三个业务部门组成：电影娱乐、直接面向消费者和电视媒体。派拉蒙影业拥有电影娱乐领域一些最强大的品牌，包括派拉蒙影业和派拉蒙动画。 PPC 业务还包括派拉蒙家庭娱乐公司、派拉蒙影业国际公司、派拉蒙授权公司和派拉蒙工作室集团。在线联系派拉蒙影业： 官方网站：http://www.paramount.com/ TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@paramountpics Instagram：http://www.instagram.com/ParamountPics Twitter：https://twitter.com/paramountpics YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/user/Paramount Facebook：https://www.fa
